name: Cat Paws And Dungeon
short_description: All your milk has been stolen; it's time to embark on an adventure to catch the thief. Push, shoot, think. In this incredible game with beautiful pixel art, you'll test your intelligence and problem-solving skills as you navigate through the 51 floors of this cavern.
detailed_description:
Embark on a Fun Adventure with Gaspachi!

Take control of Gaspachi in his first quest to recover his precious bottles of milk, which have been stolen by a mysterious thief. To succeed, you must solve 51 challenging levels filled with obstacles and enemies that will test your wits and skills.

Each level will bring new challenges where you must push boxes, defeat enemies, and collect as many bottles of milk as possible. Do you have what it takes to overcome every challenge and face the thief head-on?

🧩 FEATURES:

🎨 Beautiful and colorful pixel art that immerses you in a vibrant and charming world.

🕹️ Challenging and addictive gameplay with push mechanics—you’ll also have your powerful yarn balls to solve puzzles.

👾 A variety of enemies that will test your dexterity and strategy.

🏆 51 clever levels that will make you think before you act.
